scripts.deploy:pages: pnpm dlx wrangler@4.84.0 pages deploy frontend --project-name gov-budget --branch main
scripts.check:frontend: node --check frontend/assets/js/app.js && node --check frontend/assets/js/map.js && node --check tools/generate-nevada-demo.mjs
scripts.check:rust: cargo fmt --check --all && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace
scripts.check: pnpm check:frontend && pnpm check:rust && pnpm validate:data && pnpm check:backend
